title: Tail Skew Context

source.name: CBOE SKEW Index History
source.note: Operator-verified manual extract from Cboe CDN SKEW_History.csv (DATE,SKEW). Latest verified row 2026-06-18 (146.72). Cboe CSV does not yet include 2026-07-01 — card asOf uses latest verified source session, not equity reference. Verify with npx tsx scripts/ghostflow/skew-source-spike.ts --skew-csv <local-path>.

methodology.indexDefinition: Cboe SKEW index — SPX options tail-skew pricing context (index level, not OHLC bundle).

caveats: Display-only tail-skew context — not included in the Research Composite
Distinct from CBOE VIX-based optionsVolatilityAmplifier (vol level, score-fed)
Distinct from OCC index-options activity proxy (volume intensity, display-only)
Not 0DTE, not dealer gamma, not GEX, not implied correlation dispersion
Not a trading signal. Not an allocation recommendation. mappingStatus not_final

display.headline: SKEW index level: 146.72
display.body: Cboe SKEW tracks SPX tail-skew pricing; higher readings can indicate richer outlier-risk protection pricing. VIX remains the score-fed volatility level input.
display.caveat: Display-only tail-skew context. Not VIX, not 0DTE, not dealer gamma, and not a score input.

operatorNotes: Latest verified Cboe SKEW session 2026-06-18 (146.72). Equity reference is 2026-07-01 — Cboe SKEW_History.csv has no 2026-07-01 row at operator extract; card lags reference until Cboe publishes that session.
